title: Beyond Vanilla
description: End Update, Progression rework, Weapons, Enchantments, and more...
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a1c2068aabd600df57cbcaa1fa2210e3673bc71_0.webp)
# About
This mod adds more Enchantments, (agility, lightness, ect.) Weapons, (BattleAxes, Scythe, Momentum Mace) **_Deep Caves_** Dimension, Vanilla progression lengthened and new Structures.

## Roadmap
- Tons of new food items
- Villager Rebalance
- Developing Deep Caves further
- More Enchants
- More Structures


### Who's making this
There are 3 people working on this mod

**Bijssels** is the creator and programmer.

**OxiMalakas** makes textures and gives ideas.

**Rio_3505** makes textures and gives ideas.


### Imcompatiable mods
Mods that change how anvils work are not compatiable with this mod. We removed too expensive ourselves already so dont worry about that mod!
